nasb.text: Furthermore I have heard the groaning of the sons of Israel, because the Egyptians are holding them in bondage, and I have remembered My covenant.

esv.text: Moreover, I have heard the groaning of the people of Israel whom the Egyptians hold as slaves, and I have remembered my covenant.

cnv.text: 而且我也聽見了以色列人因埃及人所加的奴役而發的哀聲，就記念我的約。

ccb.text: 我已听见以色列人因受埃及人的奴役而发出的呼求，也想起了我的约。
